endpoints.name: GET /download/{resourceName}
endpoints.description: Downloads media. Download is supported on the URI `/download/{resource_name=**}?alt=media.` **Note**: Download requests will not be successful without including `alt=media` query string.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{RESOURCENAME}} with a real resourcename.

endpoints.name: POST /media/{resourceName}
endpoints.description: Uploads media. Upload is supported on the URI `/upload/media/{resource_name=**}?upload_type=media.` **Note**: Upload requests will not be successful without including `upload_type=media` query string.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{RESOURCENAME}} with a real resourcename.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/advertisers
endpoints.description: Lists advertisers that are accessible to the current user. The order is defined by the order_by parameter. A single partner_id is required. Cross-partner listing is not supported.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: POST /v2/advertisers
endpoints.description: Creates a new advertiser. Returns the newly created advertiser if successful. This method can take up to 180 seconds to complete.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/advertisers/{advertiserId}
endpoints.description: Gets an advertiser.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ADVERTISERID}} with a real advertiserid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /v2/advertisers/{advertiserId}
endpoints.description: Deletes an advertiser. Deleting an advertiser will delete all of its child resources, for example, campaigns, insertion orders and line items. A deleted advertiser cannot be recovered.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ADVERTISERID}} with a real advertiserid.

endpoints.name: PATCH /v2/advertisers/{advertiserId}
endpoints.description: Updates an existing advertiser. Returns the updated advertiser if successful.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ADVERTISERID}} with a real advertiserid.

endpoints.name: POST /v2/advertisers/{advertiserId}/assets
endpoints.description: Uploads an asset. Returns the ID of the newly uploaded asset if successful. The asset file size should be no more than 10 MB for images, 200 MB for ZIP files, and 1 GB for videos. Must be used within the [multipart media upload process](/display-video/api/guides/how-tos/upload#multipart). Examples using provided client libraries can be found in our [Creating Creatives guide](/display-video/api/guides/creating-creatives/overview#upload_an_asset).
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ADVERTISERID}} with a real advertiserid.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/advertisers/{advertiserId}/campaigns
endpoints.description: Lists campaigns in an advertiser. The order is defined by the order_by parameter. If a filter by entity_status is not specified, campaigns with `ENTITY_STATUS_ARCHIVED` will not be included in the results.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ADVERTISERID}} with a real advertiserid.

endpoints.name: POST /v2/advertisers/{advertiserId}/campaigns
endpoints.description: Creates a new campaign. Returns the newly created campaign if successful.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ADVERTISERID}} with a real advertiserid.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/advertisers/{advertiserId}/campaigns/{campaignId}
endpoints.description: Gets a campaign.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{CAMPAIGNID}} with a real campaignid. Replace {{ADVERTISERID}} with a real advertiserid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /v2/advertisers/{advertiserId}/campaigns/{campaignId}
endpoints.description: Permanently deletes a campaign. A deleted campaign cannot be recovered. The campaign should be archived first, i.e. set entity_status to `ENTITY_STATUS_ARCHIVED`, to be able to delete it.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{CAMPAIGNID}} with a real campaignid. Replace {{ADVERTISERID}} with a real advertiserid.

endpoints.name: PATCH /v2/advertisers/{advertiserId}/campaigns/{campaignId}
endpoints.description: Updates an existing campaign. Returns the updated campaign if successful.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{CAMPAIGNID}} with a real campaignid. Replace {{ADVERTISERID}} with a real advertiserid.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/advertisers/{advertiserId}/campaigns/{campaignId}/targetingTypes/{targetingType}/assignedTargetingOptions
endpoints.description: Lists the targeting options assigned to a campaign for a specified targeting type.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{TARGETINGTYPE}} with a real targetingtype. Replace {{CAMPAIGNID}} with a real campaignid. Replace {{ADVERTISERID}} with a real advertiserid.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/advertisers/{advertiserId}/campaigns/{campaignId}/targetingTypes/{targetingType}/assignedTargetingOptions/{assignedTargetingOptionId}
endpoints.description: Gets a single targeting option assigned to a campaign.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ASSIGNEDTARGETINGOPTIONID}} with a real assignedtargetingoptionid. Replace {{TARGETINGTYPE}} with a real targetingtype. Replace {{CAMPAIGNID}} with a real campaignid. Replace {{ADVERTISERID}} with a real advertiserid.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/advertisers/{advertiserId}/campaigns/{campaignId}:listAssignedTargetingOptions
endpoints.description: Lists assigned targeting options of a campaign across targeting types.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{CAMPAIGNID}} with a real campaignid. Replace {{ADVERTISERID}} with a real advertiserid.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/advertisers/{advertiserId}/channels
endpoints.description: Lists channels for a partner or advertiser.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ADVERTISERID}} with a real advertiserid.

endpoints.name: POST /v2/advertisers/{advertiserId}/channels
endpoints.description: Creates a new channel. Returns the newly created channel if successful.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ADVERTISERID}} with a real advertiserid.

endpoints.name: PATCH /v2/advertisers/{advertiserId}/channels/{channelId}
endpoints.description: Updates a channel. Returns the updated channel if successful.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{CHANNELID}} with a real channelid. Replace {{ADVERTISERID}} with a real advertiserid.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/advertisers/{advertiserId}/channels/{channelId}/sites
endpoints.description: Lists sites in a channel.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{CHANNELID}} with a real channelid. Replace {{ADVERTISERID}} with a real advertiserid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /v2/advertisers/{advertiserId}/channels/{channelId}/sites/{urlOrAppId}
endpoints.description: Deletes a site from a channel.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{URLORAPPID}} with a real urlorappid. Replace {{CHANNELID}} with a real channelid. Replace {{ADVERTISERID}} with a real advertiserid.

endpoints.name: POST /v2/advertisers/{advertiserId}/channels/{channelId}/sites:bulkEdit
endpoints.description: Bulk edits sites under a single channel. The operation will delete the sites provided in BulkEditSitesRequest.deleted_sites and then create the sites provided in BulkEditSitesRequest.created_sites.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{CHANNELID}} with a real channelid. Replace {{ADVERTISERID}} with a real advertiserid.

endpoints.name: POST /v2/advertisers/{advertiserId}/channels/{channelId}/sites:replace
endpoints.description: Replaces all of the sites under a single channel. The operation will replace the sites under a channel with the sites provided in ReplaceSitesRequest.new_sites.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{CHANNELID}} with a real channelid. Replace {{ADVERTISERID}} with a real advertiserid.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/advertisers/{advertiserId}/creatives
endpoints.description: Lists creatives in an advertiser. The order is defined by the order_by parameter. If a filter by entity_status is not specified, creatives with `ENTITY_STATUS_ARCHIVED` will not be included in the results.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ADVERTISERID}} with a real advertiserid.

endpoints.name: POST /v2/advertisers/{advertiserId}/creatives
endpoints.description: Creates a new creative. Returns the newly created creative if successful.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ADVERTISERID}} with a real advertiserid.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/advertisers/{advertiserId}/creatives/{creativeId}
endpoints.description: Gets a creative.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{CREATIVEID}} with a real creativeid. Replace {{ADVERTISERID}} with a real advertiserid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /v2/advertisers/{advertiserId}/creatives/{creativeId}
endpoints.description: Deletes a creative. Returns error code `NOT_FOUND` if the creative does not exist. The creative should be archived first, i.e. set entity_status to `ENTITY_STATUS_ARCHIVED`, before it can be deleted.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{CREATIVEID}} with a real creativeid. Replace {{ADVERTISERID}} with a real advertiserid.

endpoints.name: PATCH /v2/advertisers/{advertiserId}/creatives/{creativeId}
endpoints.description: Updates an existing creative. Returns the updated creative if successful.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{CREATIVEID}} with a real creativeid. Replace {{ADVERTISERID}} with a real advertiserid.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/advertisers/{advertiserId}/insertionOrders
endpoints.description: Lists insertion orders in an advertiser. The order is defined by the order_by parameter. If a filter by entity_status is not specified, insertion orders with `ENTITY_STATUS_ARCHIVED` will not be included in the results.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ADVERTISERID}} with a real advertiserid.

endpoints.name: POST /v2/advertisers/{advertiserId}/insertionOrders
endpoints.description: Creates a new insertion order. Returns the newly created insertion order if successful.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ADVERTISERID}} with a real advertiserid.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/advertisers/{advertiserId}/insertionOrders/{insertionOrderId}
endpoints.description: Gets an insertion order. Returns error code `NOT_FOUND` if the insertion order does not exist.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{INSERTIONORDERID}} with a real insertionorderid. Replace {{ADVERTISERID}} with a real advertiserid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /v2/advertisers/{advertiserId}/insertionOrders/{insertionOrderId}
endpoints.description: Deletes an insertion order. Returns error code `NOT_FOUND` if the insertion order does not exist. The insertion order should be archived first, i.e. set entity_status to `ENTITY_STATUS_ARCHIVED`, to be able to delete it.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{INSERTIONORDERID}} with a real insertionorderid. Replace {{ADVERTISERID}} with a real advertiserid.

endpoints.name: PATCH /v2/advertisers/{advertiserId}/insertionOrders/{insertionOrderId}
endpoints.description: Updates an existing insertion order. Returns the updated insertion order if successful.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{INSERTIONORDERID}} with a real insertionorderid. Replace {{ADVERTISERID}} with a real advertiserid.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/advertisers/{advertiserId}/insertionOrders/{insertionOrderId}/targetingTypes/{targetingType}/assignedTargetingOptions
endpoints.description: Lists the targeting options assigned to an insertion order.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{INSERTIONORDERID}} with a real insertionorderid. Replace {{TARGETINGTYPE}} with a real targetingtype. Replace {{ADVERTISERID}} with a real advertiserid.

endpoints.name: POST /v2/advertisers/{advertiserId}/insertionOrders/{insertionOrderId}/targetingTypes/{targetingType}/assignedTargetingOptions
endpoints.description: Assigns a targeting option to an insertion order. Returns the assigned targeting option if successful. Supported targeting types: * `TARGETING_TYPE_AGE_RANGE` * `TARGETING_TYPE_BROWSER` * `TARGETING_TYPE_CATEGORY` * `TARGETING_TYPE_CHANNEL` * `TARGETING_TYPE_DEVICE_MAKE_MODEL` * `TARGETING_TYPE_DIGITAL_CONTENT_LABEL_EXCLUSION` * `TARGETING_TYPE_ENVIRONMENT` * `TARGETING_TYPE_GENDER` * `TARGETING_TYPE_KEYWORD` * `TARGETING_TYPE_LANGUAGE` * `TARGETING_TYPE_NEGATIVE_KEYWORD_LIST` * `TARGETING_TYPE_OPERATING_SYSTEM` * `TARGETING_TYPE_PARENTAL_STATUS` * `TARGETING_TYPE_SENSITIVE_CATEGORY_EXCLUSION` * `TARGETING_TYPE_VIEWABILITY`
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{INSERTIONORDERID}} with a real insertionorderid. Replace {{TARGETINGTYPE}} with a real targetingtype. Replace {{ADVERTISERID}} with a real advertiserid.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/advertisers/{advertiserId}/insertionOrders/{insertionOrderId}/targetingTypes/{targetingType}/assignedTargetingOptions/{assignedTargetingOptionId}
endpoints.description: Gets a single targeting option assigned to an insertion order.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ASSIGNEDTARGETINGOPTIONID}} with a real assignedtargetingoptionid. Replace {{INSERTIONORDERID}} with a real insertionorderid. Replace {{TARGETINGTYPE}} with a real targetingtype. Replace {{ADVERTISERID}} with a real advertiserid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /v2/advertisers/{advertiserId}/insertionOrders/{insertionOrderId}/targetingTypes/{targetingType}/assignedTargetingOptions/{assignedTargetingOptionId}
endpoints.description: Deletes an assigned targeting option from an insertion order. Supported targeting types: * `TARGETING_TYPE_AGE_RANGE` * `TARGETING_TYPE_BROWSER` * `TARGETING_TYPE_CATEGORY` * `TARGETING_TYPE_CHANNEL` * `TARGETING_TYPE_DEVICE_MAKE_MODEL` * `TARGETING_TYPE_DIGITAL_CONTENT_LABEL_EXCLUSION` * `TARGETING_TYPE_ENVIRONMENT` * `TARGETING_TYPE_GENDER` * `TARGETING_TYPE_KEYWORD` * `TARGETING_TYPE_LANGUAGE` * `TARGETING_TYPE_NEGATIVE_KEYWORD_LIST` * `TARGETING_TYPE_OPERATING_SYSTEM` * `TARGETING_TYPE_PARENTAL_STATUS` * `TARGETING_TYPE_SENSITIVE_CATEGORY_EXCLUSION` * `TARGETING_TYPE_VIEWABILITY`
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ASSIGNEDTARGETINGOPTIONID}} with a real assignedtargetingoptionid. Replace {{INSERTIONORDERID}} with a real insertionorderid. Replace {{TARGETINGTYPE}} with a real targetingtype. Replace {{ADVERTISERID}} with a real advertiserid.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/advertisers/{advertiserId}/insertionOrders/{insertionOrderId}:listAssignedTargetingOptions
endpoints.description: Lists assigned targeting options of an insertion order across targeting types.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{INSERTIONORDERID}} with a real insertionorderid. Replace {{ADVERTISERID}} with a real advertiserid.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/advertisers/{advertiserId}/invoices
endpoints.description: Lists invoices posted for an advertiser in a given month. Invoices generated by billing profiles with a "Partner" invoice level are not retrievable through this method.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ADVERTISERID}} with a real advertiserid.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/advertisers/{advertiserId}/invoices:lookupInvoiceCurrency
endpoints.description: Retrieves the invoice currency used by an advertiser in a given month.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ADVERTISERID}} with a real advertiserid.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/advertisers/{advertiserId}/lineItems
endpoints.description: Lists line items in an advertiser. The order is defined by the order_by parameter. If a filter by entity_status is not specified, line items with `ENTITY_STATUS_ARCHIVED` will not be included in the results.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ADVERTISERID}} with a real advertiserid.

endpoints.name: POST /v2/advertisers/{advertiserId}/lineItems
endpoints.description: Creates a new line item. Returns the newly created line item if successful.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ADVERTISERID}} with a real advertiserid.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/advertisers/{advertiserId}/lineItems/{lineItemId}
endpoints.description: Gets a line item.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{LINEITEMID}} with a real lineitemid. Replace {{ADVERTISERID}} with a real advertiserid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /v2/advertisers/{advertiserId}/lineItems/{lineItemId}
endpoints.description: Deletes a line item. Returns error code `NOT_FOUND` if the line item does not exist. The line item should be archived first, i.e. set entity_status to `ENTITY_STATUS_ARCHIVED`, to be able to delete it.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{LINEITEMID}} with a real lineitemid. Replace {{ADVERTISERID}} with a real advertiserid.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/advertisers/{advertiserId}/lineItems/{lineItemId}/targetingTypes/{targetingType}/assignedTargetingOptions
endpoints.description: Lists the targeting options assigned to a line item.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{TARGETINGTYPE}} with a real targetingtype. Replace {{LINEITEMID}} with a real lineitemid. Replace {{ADVERTISERID}} with a real advertiserid.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/advertisers/{advertiserId}/lineItems/{lineItemId}/targetingTypes/{targetingType}/assignedTargetingOptions/{assignedTargetingOptionId}
endpoints.description: Gets a single targeting option assigned to a line item.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ASSIGNEDTARGETINGOPTIONID}} with a real assignedtargetingoptionid. Replace {{TARGETINGTYPE}} with a real targetingtype. Replace {{LINEITEMID}} with a real lineitemid. Replace {{ADVERTISERID}} with a real advertiserid.

endpoints.name: POST /v2/advertisers/{advertiserId}/lineItems/{lineItemId}:duplicate
endpoints.description: Duplicates a line item. Returns the ID of the created line item if successful.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{LINEITEMID}} with a real lineitemid. Replace {{ADVERTISERID}} with a real advertiserid.

endpoints.name: POST /v2/advertisers/{advertiserId}/lineItems:generateDefault
endpoints.description: Creates a new line item with settings (including targeting) inherited from the insertion order and an `ENTITY_STATUS_DRAFT` entity_status. Returns the newly created line item if successful. There are default values based on the three fields: * The insertion order's insertion_order_type * The insertion order's automation_type * The given line_item_type
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ADVERTISERID}} with a real advertiserid.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/advertisers/{advertiserId}/locationLists
endpoints.description: Lists location lists based on a given advertiser id.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ADVERTISERID}} with a real advertiserid.

endpoints.name: POST /v2/advertisers/{advertiserId}/locationLists
endpoints.description: Creates a new location list. Returns the newly created location list if successful.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ADVERTISERID}} with a real advertiserid.

endpoints.name: PATCH /v2/advertisers/{advertiserId}/locationLists/{locationListId}
endpoints.description: Updates a location list. Returns the updated location list if successful.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{LOCATIONLISTID}} with a real locationlistid. Replace {{ADVERTISERID}} with a real advertiserid.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/advertisers/{advertiserId}/locationLists/{locationListId}/assignedLocations
endpoints.description: Lists locations assigned to a location list.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{LOCATIONLISTID}} with a real locationlistid. Replace {{ADVERTISERID}} with a real advertiserid.

endpoints.name: POST /v2/advertisers/{advertiserId}/locationLists/{locationListId}/assignedLocations
endpoints.description: Creates an assignment between a location and a location list.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{LOCATIONLISTID}} with a real locationlistid. Replace {{ADVERTISERID}} with a real advertiserid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /v2/advertisers/{advertiserId}/locationLists/{locationListId}/assignedLocations/{assignedLocationId}
endpoints.description: Deletes the assignment between a location and a location list.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ASSIGNEDLOCATIONID}} with a real assignedlocationid. Replace {{LOCATIONLISTID}} with a real locationlistid. Replace {{ADVERTISERID}} with a real advertiserid.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/advertisers/{advertiserId}/manualTriggers
endpoints.description: Lists manual triggers that are accessible to the current user for a given advertiser ID. The order is defined by the order_by parameter. A single advertiser_id is required.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ADVERTISERID}} with a real advertiserid.

endpoints.name: POST /v2/advertisers/{advertiserId}/manualTriggers
endpoints.description: Creates a new manual trigger. Returns the newly created manual trigger if successful.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ADVERTISERID}} with a real advertiserid.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/advertisers/{advertiserId}/manualTriggers/{triggerId}
endpoints.description: Gets a manual trigger.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{TRIGGERID}} with a real triggerid. Replace {{ADVERTISERID}} with a real advertiserid.

endpoints.name: PATCH /v2/advertisers/{advertiserId}/manualTriggers/{triggerId}
endpoints.description: Updates a manual trigger. Returns the updated manual trigger if successful.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{TRIGGERID}} with a real triggerid. Replace {{ADVERTISERID}} with a real advertiserid.

endpoints.name: POST /v2/advertisers/{advertiserId}/manualTriggers/{triggerId}:activate
endpoints.description: Activates a manual trigger. Each activation of the manual trigger must be at least 5 minutes apart, otherwise an error will be returned.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{TRIGGERID}} with a real triggerid. Replace {{ADVERTISERID}} with a real advertiserid.

endpoints.name: POST /v2/advertisers/{advertiserId}/manualTriggers/{triggerId}:deactivate
endpoints.description: Deactivates a manual trigger.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{TRIGGERID}} with a real triggerid. Replace {{ADVERTISERID}} with a real advertiserid.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/advertisers/{advertiserId}/negativeKeywordLists
endpoints.description: Lists negative keyword lists based on a given advertiser id.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ADVERTISERID}} with a real advertiserid.

endpoints.name: POST /v2/advertisers/{advertiserId}/negativeKeywordLists
endpoints.description: Creates a new negative keyword list. Returns the newly created negative keyword list if successful.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ADVERTISERID}} with a real advertiserid.

endpoints.name: PATCH /v2/advertisers/{advertiserId}/negativeKeywordLists/{negativeKeywordListId}
endpoints.description: Updates a negative keyword list. Returns the updated negative keyword list if successful.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NEGATIVEKEYWORDLISTID}} with a real negativekeywordlistid. Replace {{ADVERTISERID}} with a real advertiserid.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/advertisers/{advertiserId}/negativeKeywordLists/{negativeKeywordListId}/negativeKeywords
endpoints.description: Lists negative keywords in a negative keyword list.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NEGATIVEKEYWORDLISTID}} with a real negativekeywordlistid. Replace {{ADVERTISERID}} with a real advertiserid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /v2/advertisers/{advertiserId}/negativeKeywordLists/{negativeKeywordListId}/negativeKeywords/{keywordValue}
endpoints.description: Deletes a negative keyword from a negative keyword list.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{KEYWORDVALUE}} with a real keywordvalue. Replace {{NEGATIVEKEYWORDLISTID}} with a real negativekeywordlistid. Replace {{ADVERTISERID}} with a real advertiserid.

endpoints.name: POST /v2/advertisers/{advertiserId}/negativeKeywordLists/{negativeKeywordListId}/negativeKeywords:bulkEdit
endpoints.description: Bulk edits negative keywords in a single negative keyword list. The operation will delete the negative keywords provided in BulkEditNegativeKeywordsRequest.deleted_negative_keywords and then create the negative keywords provided in BulkEditNegativeKeywordsRequest.created_negative_keywords. This operation is guaranteed to be atomic and will never result in a partial success or partial failure.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NEGATIVEKEYWORDLISTID}} with a real negativekeywordlistid. Replace {{ADVERTISERID}} with a real advertiserid.

endpoints.name: POST /v2/advertisers/{advertiserId}/negativeKeywordLists/{negativeKeywordListId}/negativeKeywords:replace
endpoints.description: Replaces all negative keywords in a single negative keyword list. The operation will replace the keywords in a negative keyword list with keywords provided in ReplaceNegativeKeywordsRequest.new_negative_keywords.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NEGATIVEKEYWORDLISTID}} with a real negativekeywordlistid. Replace {{ADVERTISERID}} with a real advertiserid.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/advertisers/{advertiserId}/targetingTypes/{targetingType}/assignedTargetingOptions

endpoints.description: Audits an advertiser. Returns the counts of used entities per resource type under the advertiser provided. Used entities count towards their respective resource limit. See https://support.google.com/displayvideo/answer/6071450.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/customBiddingAlgorithms/{customBiddingAlgorithmId}:uploadScript
endpoints.description: Creates a custom bidding script reference object for a script file. The resulting reference object provides a resource path to which the script file should be uploaded. This reference object should be included in when creating a new custom bidding script object.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{CUSTOMBIDDINGALGORITHMID}} with a real custombiddingalgorithmid.

endpoints.name: POST /v2/partners/{partnerId}/channels/{channelId}/sites:bulkEdit

endpoints.name: POST /v2/partners/{partnerId}/channels/{channelId}/sites:replace
endpoints.description: Replaces all of the sites under a single channel. The operation will replace the sites under a channel with the sites provided in ReplaceSitesRequest.new_sites.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARTNERID}} with a real partnerid. Replace {{CHANNELID}} with a real channelid.

endpoints.name: POST /v2/sdfdownloadtasks
endpoints.description: Creates an SDF Download Task. Returns an Operation. An SDF Download Task is a long-running, asynchronous operation. The metadata type of this operation is SdfDownloadTaskMetadata. If the request is successful, the response type of the operation is SdfDownloadTask. The response will not include the download files, which must be retrieved with media.download. The state of operation can be retrieved with sdfdownloadtask.operations.get. Any errors can be found in the error.message. Note that error.details is expected to be empty.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/targetingTypes/{targetingType}/targetingOptions
endpoints.description: Lists targeting options of a given type.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{TARGETINGTYPE}} with a real targetingtype.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/targetingTypes/{targetingType}/targetingOptions/{targetingOptionId}
endpoints.description: Gets a single targeting option.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{TARGETINGTYPE}} with a real targetingtype. Replace {{TARGETINGOPTIONID}} with a real targetingoptionid.

endpoints.name: POST /v2/targetingTypes/{targetingType}/targetingOptions:search
endpoints.description: Searches for targeting options of a given type based on the given search terms.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{TARGETINGTYPE}} with a real targetingtype.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/users
endpoints.description: Lists users that are accessible to the current user. If two users have user roles on the same partner or advertiser, they can access each other.

endpoints.name: POST /v2/users

endpoints.name: DELETE /v2/users/{userId}
endpoints.description: Deletes a user.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{USERID}} with a real userid.

endpoints.name: PATCH /v2/users/{userId}
endpoints.description: Updates an existing user. Returns the updated user if successful.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{USERID}} with a real userid.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/{name}
endpoints.description: Gets the latest state of an asynchronous SDF download task operation. Clients should poll this method at intervals of 30 seconds.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.
